title: Vibe Title En Shattered Pastel Rainbow Illusions
sourceTitle: Vibe Title En Shattered Pastel Rainbow Illusions
prompt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Shattered Pastel Rainbow Illusions Within Brutalist Concrete Ruins",
  "master_prompt": "Extreme macro close-up portrait of The Protagonist's face, blending high-fashion couture with a raw, gritty urban environment. The subject wears an avant-garde, practical-effect face shield resembling a heavily curved, shattered transparent glass bubble. The edges of this glass visor are intricately fused with raw, damp living forest moss and tiny fragments of brutalist concrete, casting sharp, deep drop-shadows onto the hyper-textured skin. Beneath the glass, delicate strands of pastel-rainbow iridescent silk—shifting in pale pinks, blues, and yellows—are woven directly across the cheekbones and eyelids. Lit exclusively by a harsh, direct on-camera paparazzi flash, creating an uncomfortably raw 'glamour in the dirt' aesthetic. The flash triggers intense blinding micro-reflections and chromatic dispersion on the curved glass. The background is a dark, rain-slicked derelict industrial alleyway, completely thrown out of focus with an extremely shallow depth of field. Shot on Hasselblad H6D-100c with a 100mm f/2.8 Macro lens, Kodak Portra 800 pushed +1 stop for thick, visceral analog film grain. Unretouched skin, visible pores, punk-rock luxury. NO NEON.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "To fuse delicate, surreal high-fashion concepts with the aggressive, raw aesthetic of street paparazzi photography.",
    "priorities": "Macro details of skin and textures, harsh direct flash, practical surrealism (glass and moss on skin), thick film grain.",
    "device_profile": "High-resolution desktop and retina mobile displays."
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "Extreme macro close-up, symmetric facial framing.",
    "layout": "The subject's eyes and cheekbones fill the entirety of the frame, background minimized to abstract bokeh.",
    "camera_angle": "Intimate, dead-on eye-level macro.",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0 degrees"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Female",
    "identity": "The Protagonist, an avant-garde couture nomad.",
    "demographics": "Universal, androgynous features, mid-20s.",
    "face": "Hyper-detailed, raw, unretouched. Visible skin pores, peach fuzz, and natural imperfections amplified by the harsh flash.",
    "hair": "Slicked back, slightly damp and gritty, mostly out of frame.",
    "body": "Only the upper neck and jawline are visible, indicating a tense, frozen posture.",
    "expression": "Intense, deadpan, completely unfazed by the blinding flash.",
    "pose": "Static macro headshot, leaning imperceptibly forward into the lens."
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Iridescent silk threads woven onto the skin",
        "material": "Raw silk and synthetic polymer strands",
        "color": "Pastel rainbow gradient (pale pinks, blues, yellows)",
        "fit": "Skin-tight, grafted directly onto the cheeks and eyelids"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Couture macro face-shield",
        "color": "Transparent with chromatic light dispersion",
        "material": "Thick blown curved glass, living damp forest moss, raw brutalist concrete fragments",
        "brand_style": "Industrial punk meets Alexander McQueen avant-garde"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "A dark, rain-slicked, derelict industrial concrete underpass at night.",
    "surfaces": "Wet asphalt, decaying concrete, and damp organic urban overgrowth.",
    "depth": "Extremely shallow depth of field, rendering the background into an abstract, muddy bokeh.",
    "atmosphere": "Cold, hostile, and gritty, momentarily frozen in time by the blinding flash.",
    "lens_interaction": "Intense micro-reflections and harsh optical flares bouncing off the curved glass visor."
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Harsh, direct on-camera strobe (paparazzi flash style).",
    "fill": "None. Total absence of fill light.",
    "rim": "None. The lighting is completely flattened from the front.",
    "shadows": "Pitch black, razor-sharp drop shadows cast by the 3D moss and glass elements directly onto the subject's skin.",
    "color_temperature": "Neutral daylight strobe (5500K) clashing with the muddy darkness.",
    "sensor_flare": "Localized blowouts on the highly reflective portions of the shattered glass."
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "Macro prime lens",
    "focal_length": "100mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.8",
    "focus": "Razor-sharp critical focus on the iris and the boundary where moss meets the skin.",
    "sensor_format": "Medium Format (Hasselblad 100MP)",
    "perspective_distortion": "None, high optical compression yielding profound intimacy."
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "High contrast, vivid pastel highlights piercing through deep, crushed, muddy blacks.",
    "tonality": "Raw and unretouched, with blown-out highlights on the glass and dense shadows.",
    "texture": "Heavy, gritty, visceral analog film grain (Kodak Portra 800 pushed +1 stop).",
    "digital_sharpening": "None, relying entirely on the optical superiority of the medium format lens.",
    "chromatic_aberration": "Noticeable color fringing at the extreme curved edges of the glass bubble shield."
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "Neon lighting",
    "Cyberpunk elements",
    "Smooth airbrushed skin",
    "Digital painting",
    "CGI look",
    "Softbox lighting",
    "Flattering beauty light",
    "Wide angle distortion",
    "Clean studio background",
    "Fantasy illustrations",
    "Cartoon features"
  ]
}
originalPrompt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Shattered Pastel Rainbow Illusions Within Brutalist Concrete Ruins",
  "master_prompt": "Extreme macro close-up portrait of The Protagonist's face, blending high-fashion couture with a raw, gritty urban environment. The subject wears an avant-garde, practical-effect face shield resembling a heavily curved, shattered transparent glass bubble. The edges of this glass visor are intricately fused with raw, damp living forest moss and tiny fragments of brutalist concrete, casting sharp, deep drop-shadows onto the hyper-textured skin. Beneath the glass, delicate strands of pastel-rainbow iridescent silk—shifting in pale pinks, blues, and yellows—are woven directly across the cheekbones and eyelids. Lit exclusively by a harsh, direct on-camera paparazzi flash, creating an uncomfortably raw 'glamour in the dirt' aesthetic. The flash triggers intense blinding micro-reflections and chromatic dispersion on the curved glass. The background is a dark, rain-slicked derelict industrial alleyway, completely thrown out of focus with an extremely shallow depth of field. Shot on Hasselblad H6D-100c with a 100mm f/2.8 Macro lens, Kodak Portra 800 pushed +1 stop for thick, visceral analog film grain. Unretouched skin, visible pores, punk-rock luxury. NO NEON.",

promptTranslations.zh:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "破碎的粉彩彩虹幻象于野兽派混凝土废墟之中",
  "master_prompt": "极致微距特写主角脸部，融合高级时装与生涩都市环境。主体佩戴前卫实用面罩，形似曲面破碎透明玻璃泡罩。玻璃护罩边缘与潮湿森林苔藓及残破野兽派混凝土碎片精细融合，投射锐利浓重阴影于超纹理皮肤。护罩下，微妙粉彩彩虹丝绸丝线穿梭于颧骨和眼睑间，颜色在浅粉、蓝和黄间切换。仅有强烈直射的街拍闪光灯照明，呈现既粗砺又华丽的“污土中的魅惑”美学。闪光制造玻璃曲面上的炫目微反光和彩色分散。背景为暗夜雨润破败工业巷道，极浅景深致背景全然虚化为抽象散景。使用Hasselblad H6D-100c相机配100mm f/2.8微距镜头，Kodak Portra 800胶片 +1档推片，厚重胶片颗粒感。无修饰皮肤，明显毛孔，朋克奢华。绝无霓虹灯元素。",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "融合细腻超现实高定概念与尖锐街拍摄影风格。",
    "priorities": "皮肤及质地微距细节，强烈直射闪光，实用超现实主义（玻璃与苔藓皮肤融合），浓胶片颗粒。",
    "device_profile": "高分辨率桌面及视网膜移动设备。"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "极致微距特写，对称面部构图。",
    "layout": "主体眼睛与颧骨充满画面，背景最小化成抽象散景。",
    "camera_angle": "亲密正面眼平微距。",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0度"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "女性",
    "identity": "主角，一位前卫时装流浪者。",
    "demographics": "中性特征，20多岁。",
    "face": "超细节、未经修饰，肤质毛孔、绒毛及自然瑕疵因闪光被放大。",
    "hair": "向后梳理，略湿且带颗粒感，大部分画外。",
    "body": "仅露出上颈及下颌线，呈紧张凝固姿态。",
    "expression": "凝视冷漠，毫不畏惧强烈闪光。",
    "pose": "静态微距头部肖像，微微向镜头前倾。"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "织于皮肤上的彩虹丝绸线",
        "material": "生丝与合成聚合物",
        "color": "粉彩彩虹渐变（浅粉、蓝、黄）",
        "fit": "紧贴肌肤，直接缀于颊骨及眼睑"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "高定微距面罩",
        "color": "透明、带色散光效",
        "material": "厚吹制曲面玻璃、潮湿活苔藓、残破野兽派混凝土碎片",
        "brand_style": "工业朋克融合Alexander McQueen前卫风"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "夜晚潮湿雨润破败工业混凝土涵洞。",
    "surfaces": "湿润沥青、腐朽混凝土及潮湿有机城市蔓生。",
    "depth": "极浅景深，背景变为抽象模糊散景。",
    "atmosphere": "寒冷、敌意且粗犷，被闪光凝固一瞬。",
    "lens_interaction": "玻璃护罩上强烈微反光及光晕。"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "强烈正面闪光（街拍闪光样式）。",
    "fill": "无填光，完全无填充光源。",
    "rim": "无边缘光，光线完全扁平正面。",
    "shadows": "纯黑、犀利阴影由三维苔藓及玻璃元件直投于皮肤。",
    "color_temperature": "中性日光闪光（5500K）与暗沉背景冲突。",
    "sensor_flare": "护罩高反光处局部过曝。"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "微距定焦镜头",
    "focal_length": "100mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.8",
    "focus": "对虹膜及苔藓与皮肤交界处极致锐利。",
    "sensor_format": "中画幅（哈苏100MP）",
    "perspective_distortion": "无畸变，高光学压缩带来极致亲密感。"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "高对比，鲜明粉彩高光穿透深重暗色。",
    "tonality": "未经修饰，玻璃亮部过曝浓阴影。",
    "texture": "浓厚粗糙模拟胶片颗粒感（Kodak Portra 800推片+1）。",
    "digital_sharpening": "无，完全依赖中画幅镜头光学品质。",
    "chromatic_aberration": "护罩极曲边缘明显色差。"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "霓虹灯",
    "赛博朋克元素",
    "空气刷柔滑皮肤",
    "数字绘画",
    "CGI质感",
    "柔光箱照明",
    "甜美美颜光",
    "广角畸变",
    "干净工作室背景",
    "奇幻插画",
    "卡通特征"
  ]
}
promptTranslations.fr:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Illusions Arc-en-Ciel Pastel Brisées au Sein de Ruines Brutalistes en Béton",
  "master_prompt": "Portrait macro extrême du visage du Protagoniste, mêlant haute couture et environnement urbain brut et rugueux. Le sujet porte un bouclier facial avant-gardiste en verre transparent très courbé et brisé. Les bords du casque en verre sont fusionnés avec de la mousse forestière humide et vivante ainsi que de petits fragments de béton brutaliste, projetant des ombres portées nettes et profondes sur la peau hyper-texturée. Sous le verre, des brins délicats de soie irisée pastel — changeant en roses pâles, bleus et jaunes — sont tissés directement sur les pommettes et les paupières. Éclairé uniquement par un flash dur et direct de paparazzi, créant une esthétique brute de 'glamour dans la saleté'. Le flash déclenche des micro-réflexions aveuglantes et une dispersion chromatique sur le verre courbé. L’arrière-plan est une ruelle industrielle délabrée, sombre et mouillée par la pluie, totalement floutée par une profondeur de champ extrêmement faible. Photo prise avec un Hasselblad H6D-100c et un objectif macro 100 mm f/2.8, pellicule Kodak Portra 800 poussé d’1 stop pour un grain analogique épais et viscéral. Peau non retouchée, pores visibles, luxe punk-rock. PAS DE NÉON.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Fusionner des concepts de haute couture délicats et surréalistes avec l’esthétique agressive et brute de la photographie de paparazzi de rue.",
    "priorities": "Détails macro de la peau et des textures, flash direct dur, surréalisme pratique (verre et mousse sur la peau), grain de film épais.",
    "device_profile": "Affichages de bureau haute résolution et mobiles retina."
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "Gros plan macro extrême, cadrage facial symétrique.",
    "layout": "Les yeux et les pommettes du sujet remplissent entièrement le cadre, arrière-plan réduit à un bokeh abstrait.",
    "camera_angle": "Intime, macro au niveau des yeux bien frontal.",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0 degrés"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Femme",
    "identity": "Le Protagoniste, nomade couture avant-gardiste.",
    "demographics": "Universel, traits androgynes, milieu de vingtaine.",
    "face": "Hyper-détaillé, brut, non retouché. Pores visibles, duvet de pêche, imperfections naturelles amplifiées par le flash dur.",
    "hair": "Rétréci en arrière, légèrement humide et granuleux, principalement hors cadre.",
    "body": "Visible uniquement le haut du cou et la mâchoire, posture tendue et figée.",
    "expression": "Intense, impassible, complètement indifférente au flash aveuglant.",
    "pose": "Portrait statique macro, légèrement penché vers l’avant vers l’objectif."
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Fils de soie irisée tissés sur la peau",
        "material": "Soie brute et brins de polymère synthétique",
        "color": "Dégradé arc-en-ciel pastel (roses pâles, bleus, jaunes)",
        "fit": "Moulant, greffé directement sur les pommettes et les paupières"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Bouclier facial couture macro",
        "color": "Transparent avec dispersion chromatique des lumières",
        "material": "Verre soufflé épais incurvé, mousse forestière humide vivante, fragments bruts de béton brutaliste",
        "brand_style": "Punk industriel rencontre avant-garde Alexander McQueen"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Un souterrain industriel en béton délabré, sombre et mouillé par la pluie la nuit.",
    "surfaces": "Asphalte humide, béton en décomposition et surcroissance organique urbaine humide.",
    "depth": "Profondeur de champ extrêmement faible, arrière-plan en bokeh abstrait et boueux.",
    "atmosphere": "Froid, hostile et rugueux, figé momentanément par le flash aveuglant.",
    "lens_interaction": "Micro-réflexions intenses et éblouissements optiques durs sur le casque en verre courbé."
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Éclair stroboscopique dur et direct sur l’appareil (style flash paparazzi).",
    "fill": "Aucun. Absence totale de lumière de remplissage.",
    "rim": "Aucun. Éclairage complètement aplati de face.",
    "shadows": "Noirs profonds, ombres portées très nettes projetées par la mousse 3D et les éléments en verre directement sur la peau du sujet.",
    "color_temperature": "Lumière stroboscopique de jour neutre (5500K) en contraste avec l’obscurité boueuse.",
    "sensor_flare": "Surcharges localisées sur les parties très réfléchissantes du verre brisé."
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "Objectif macro prime",
    "focal_length": "100mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.8",
    "focus": "Mise au point critique et nette sur l’iris et la limite entre la mousse et la peau.",
    "sensor_format": "Moyen Format (Hasselblad 100MP)",
    "perspective_distortion": "Aucune, compression optique élevée offrant une intimité profonde."
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "Contraste élevé, reflets vifs pastels perçant les noirs profonds et écrasés.",
    "tonality": "Brut et non retouché, avec des hautes lumières saturées sur le verre et des ombres denses.",
    "texture": "Grain de film analogique lourd, rugueux et viscéral (Kodak Portra 800 poussé +1 arrêt).",
    "digital_sharpening": "Aucun, reposant entièrement sur la supériorité optique de l’objectif moyen format.",
    "chromatic_aberration": "Franges colorées visibles aux extrémités courbées du bouclier en verre."
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "Éclairage néon",
    "Éléments cyberpunk",
    "Peau lissée à l’aérographe",
    "Peinture digitale",
    "Aspect CGI",
    "Éclairage softbox",
    "Lumière flatteuse beauté",
    "Distorsion grand angle",
    "Fond studio propre",
    "Illustrations fantastiques",
    "Traits de dessin animé"
  ]
}
promptTranslations.ru:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Разбитые пастельные радужные иллюзии среди бруталистских бетонных руин",
  "master_prompt": "Экстремальный макро-крупный план лица Главной героини, сочетающий высокую моду кутюра с сырой, грубой городской средой. На героине авангардный защитный экран для лица, напоминающий сильно изогнутый, разбитый прозрачный стеклянный пузырь. Края этого стеклянного визора искусно сращены с сырой влажной лесной мхом и мелкими фрагментами бруталистского бетона, отбрасывающими резкие глубокие тени на гипертекстурированную кожу. Под стеклом тонкие нити пастельного радужного иридесцентного шёлка — меняющиеся в бледно-розовых, голубых и жёлтых оттенках — переплетены прямо через скулы и веки. Освещено исключительно резкой прямой вспышкой папарацци, создающей некомфортно сырой «гламур в грязи». Вспышка вызывает интенсивные ослепляющие микровспышки и хроматическую дисперсию на изогнутом стекле. Фон — тёмный, мокрый от дождя заброшенный индустриальный переулок, полностью размытый с экстремально малой глубиной резкости. Снято на Hasselblad H6D-100c с объективом 100мм f/2.8 Macro, пленка Kodak Portra 800 с повышением экспозиции на +1 стоп для густой, живой аналоговой зернистости. Неретушированная кожа, видимые поры, панк-рок роскошь. БЕЗ НЕОНА.",

promptTranslations.pt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Ilusões de Arco-Íris Pastel Estilhaçadas Dentro de Ruínas Brutalistas de Concreto",
  "master_prompt": "Retrato macro extremo do rosto do Protagonista, mesclando alta-costura de moda com um ambiente urbano cru e áspero. O sujeito usa um escudo facial avant-garde de efeito prático que se assemelha a uma bolha de vidro transparente curva e estilhaçada. As bordas deste visor de vidro são intricadamente fundidas com musgo vivo úmido de floresta e pequenos fragmentos de concreto brutalista, projetando sombras profundas e nítidas sobre a pele hipertexturizada. Sob o vidro, delicados fios de seda iridescente em tons pastel de arco-íris — variando em rosas pálidos, azuis e amarelos — são tecidos diretamente sobre as maçãs do rosto e pálpebras. Iluminado exclusivamente por um flash direto e forte de paparazzi, criando uma estética desconfortavelmente crua de 'glamour na sujeira'. O flash provoca micro-reflexos intensos e dispersão cromática no vidro curvo. O fundo é um beco industrial abandonado escuro e molhado pela chuva, completamente desfocado com profundidade de campo extremamente rasa. Fotografado com Hasselblad H6D-100c com lente macro 100mm f/2.8, filme Kodak Portra 800 com +1 stop para grão analógico espesso e visceral. Pele não retocada, poros visíveis, luxo punk-rock. SEM NEON.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Fundir conceitos delicados e surreais de alta-costura com a estética agressiva e crua da fotografia de paparazzi de rua.",
    "priorities": "Detalhes macro da pele e texturas, flash direto forte, surrealismo prático (vidro e musgo na pele), grão de filme espesso.",
    "device_profile": "Displays de desktop de alta resolução e mobile retina."
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "Macro extremo, enquadramento facial simétrico.",
    "layout": "Olhos e maçãs do rosto do sujeito preenchem todo o quadro, fundo minimizado a bokeh abstrato.",
    "camera_angle": "Macro íntimo, nível dos olhos, direto.",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0 graus"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Feminino",
    "identity": "O Protagonista, um nômade avant-garde de alta-costura.",
    "demographics": "Universal, traços andróginos, meados dos 20 anos.",
    "face": "Hiper-detalhado, cru, não retocado. Poros visíveis, penugem, imperfeições naturais amplificadas pelo flash forte.",
    "hair": "Penteado para trás, ligeiramente úmido e áspero, maior parte fora do quadro.",
    "body": "Apenas pescoço superior e linha da mandíbula visíveis, indicando postura tensa e congelada.",
    "expression": "Intensa, séria, completamente indiferente ao flash ofuscante.",

    "accessories": [

        "color": "Transparente com dispersão cromática da luz",
        "material": "Vidro soprado curvo espesso, musgo vivo úmido de floresta, fragmentos crus de concreto brutalista",
        "brand_style": "Punk industrial encontra avant-garde Alexander McQueen"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {

    "surfaces": "Asfalto molhado, concreto em decadência e vegetação urbana úmida orgânica.",
    "depth": "Profundidade de campo extremamente rasa, transformando o fundo em bokeh abstrato e turvo.",
    "atmosphere": "Frio, hostil e áspero, momentaneamente congelado no tempo pelo flash ofuscante.",
    "lens_interaction": "Micro-reflexos intensos e reflexos ópticos fortes refletindo no visor de vidro curvo."
  },
  "lighting": {

    "fill": "Nenhum. Ausência total de luz de preenchimento.",
    "rim": "Nenhum. A iluminação é completamente achatada pela frente.",
    "shadows": "Sombras negras profundas e nítidas projetadas pelos elementos 3D de musgo e vidro diretamente na pele do sujeito.",
    "color_temperature": "Estroboscópio de luz do dia neutra (5500K) em contraste com a escuridão turva.",

promptTranslations.ja:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "ブルータリズムのコンクリート遺跡に映る砕けたパステルレインボーの幻想",
  "master_prompt": "主人公の顔の極端なマクロクローズアップポートレート。ハイファッションのクチュールと生の都市環境を融合。被写体は高度に湾曲し砕けた透明なガラスのバブルを模した実用的な前衛的フェイスシールドを装着。ガラスの縁は湿った生きた森の苔とブルータリズムのコンクリートの小片と複雑に融合し、シャープで深い落ち影を超詳細な肌に落とす。ガラスの下には淡いピンク、青、黄色に変化するパステルレインボーの虹色絹糸が頬骨とまぶたに直接織り込まれている。カメラ直当たりの強烈なパパラッチフラッシュでのみ照らされ、『泥の中のグラマー』の不快なまでに生々しい美学。
フラッシュは湾曲ガラスに強烈な白熱反射と色収差を誘発。背景は雨で濡れた廃墟のインダストリアルな路地で完全にぼけ、極浅い被写界深度。Hasselblad H6D-100cの100mm f/2.8マクロレンズで撮影。Kodak Portra 800を+1ストッププッシュした厚いアナログフィルム粒子。未補正の肌、毛穴、パンクロックラグジュアリー。ネオン無し。",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "繊細でシュールなハイファッションを生の都市パパラッチ写真美学と融合させること。",
    "priorities": "肌や質感のマクロ詳細、強烈な直射フラッシュ、実用的なシュールリズム（肌のガラスと苔）、厚いフィルム粒子。",
    "device_profile": "高解像度デスクトップおよびレティナモバイルディスプレイ。"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "極端なマクロクローズアップ、左右対称の顔のフレーミング。",
    "layout": "被写体の目と頬骨が画面全体を満たし、背景は抽象的なボケで最小化。",
    "camera_angle": "親密で真正面のアイレベルマクロ。",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0度"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "女性",
    "identity": "前衛的クチュールノマドの主人公。",
    "demographics": "ユニバーサルでアンドロジナスな特徴、20代半ば。",
    "face": "超詳細で未補正の生肌。毛穴、産毛、自然な欠点が強烈なフラッシュで強調。",
    "hair": "後ろに撫でつけられ、やや湿り気があり砂埃っぽく、ほぼ画面外。",
    "body": "首の上部と顎のラインのみが見え、緊張した凍りつくような姿勢を示唆。",
    "expression": "強烈で無表情、まばゆいフラッシュにも動じない。",
    "pose": "静的なマクロヘッドショットでわずかにレンズに向かって前傾。"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "肌に織り込まれた虹色絹糸",
        "material": "生絹と合成ポリマーストランド",
        "color": "パステルレインボーグラデーション（淡いピンク、青、黄色）",
        "fit": "肌にぴったり密着し頬とまぶたに植え付けられている"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "クチュールマクロフェイスシールド",
        "color": "透明で色収差による光の分散を伴う",
        "material": "厚吹きガラス、湿った生きた森の苔、ブルータリズムの生コンクリート断片",
        "brand_style": "インダストリアルパンクとアレキサンダーマックイーンの前衛的融合"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "夜の雨に濡れた廃墟のインダストリアルコンクリートアンダーパス。",
    "surfaces": "濡れたアスファルト、朽ちかけたコンクリート、湿った有機的都市の草木。",
    "depth": "極浅い被写界深度で背景は抽象的で泥だらけのボケとなる。",
    "atmosphere": "冷たく敵対的でざらついた、まばゆいフラッシュで一瞬凍結。",
    "lens_interaction": "湾曲したガラスバイザーの強烈な微細反射と厳しい光のフレア。"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "強烈な直射オンカメラストロボ（パパラッチフラッシュスタイル）。",
    "fill": "無し。フィルライトまったくなし。",
    "rim": "無し。照明は前から完全に平坦。",
    "shadows": "苔とガラスの3D要素による鋭く真っ黒な落ち影が直接肌に落ちる。",
    "color_temperature": "ニュートラルな昼光ストロボ（5500K）が暗い泥のような闇と対立。",

    "focal_length": "100mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.8",
    "focus": "虹色絹糸と肌の境界、苔に鋭利なクリティカルフォーカス。",
    "sensor_format": "中判（Hasselblad 100MP）",

  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "高コントラストで鮮やかなパステルのハイライトが深い濁った黒を突き刺す。",
    "tonality": "未補正で生々しく、ガラスは飛ばし気味で濃密な影。",
    "texture": "厚くざらざらしたアナログフィルム粒子感（Kodak Portra 800＋1ストッププッシュ）。",
    "digital_sharpening": "無し。中判レンズの光学的性能に完全依存。",
    "chromatic_aberration": "極端に湾曲したガラスバブル端に目立つ色収差。"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [

promptTranslations.ko:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "브루탈리스트 콘크리트 폐허 속 붕괴된 파스텔 무지개 환상",
  "master_prompt": "주인공 얼굴의 극한 매크로 클로즈업 초상화, 하이패션 꾸뛰르와 거친 도시 환경을 혼합. 주인공은 심하게 곡선진 깨진 투명 유리 방울 같은 실용적 효과의 아방가르드 얼굴 보호막을 착용. 이 유리 바이저 가장자리에는 촉촉한 살아있는 숲 이끼와 브루탈리스트 콘크리트 조각이 복잡하게 융합되어 하이퍼 텍스처 피부에 날카롭고 깊은 그림자를 드리운다. 유리 아래에는 연한 분홍, 파랑, 노랑 색상으로 변하는 파스텔 무지개 빛깔의 비단 가닥들이 광대뼈와 눈꺼풀에 바로 직조되어 있다. 강렬하고 직접적인 카메라 플래시로만 조명되어 ‘먼지 속의 화려함’이라는 불편할 정도로 날것의 미적 효과를 창출. 플래시는 굴곡진 유리에서 강렬하고 눈부신 미세 반사와 색 분산을 유발. 배경은 어둡고 비에 젖은 낡은 산업 골목으로 극도로 얕은 피사계 심도로 완전히 흐릿하며 Hasselblad H6D-100c의 100mm f/2.8 매크로 렌즈로 촬영. Kodak Portra 800 필름을 +1 스톱으로 과감하게 밀어 두껍고 육감적인 아날로그 필름 그레인. 리터치 없는 피부, 보이는 모공, 펑크 록 럭셔리 스타일. 네온 금지.",
